benefits.description: Much stronger appetite suppression on Phat Strength compared to Arctic at the same 1mg dose

protocol_notes: OP compared Arctic and Phat Strength semaglutide at the same 1mg dose; 3 weeks on Arctic, then 3 weeks on Phat Strength. Noticed significantly more appetite suppression on Phat Strength without additional side effects. Also previously tried Pound Proof. Looking for new source under $80/5mg.
